content.text:
## Summary

Found 10 files under src/. All error messages follow a consistent convention: `UPPERCASE_CODE: description`. 

**File Paths & Contents:**

**src\validate.js** - Validates name strings (throws EMPTY_NAME)

**src\parse.js** - Parses strict integers (throws BAD_INT)

**src\money.js** - Converts amounts to cents (throws NEG_AMOUNT)

**src\range.js** - Clamps values within min/max (throws BAD_RANGE)

**src\store.js** - Key-value Map wrapper (throws MISSING_KEY)

**src\auth.js** - Validates token format (throws BAD_TOKEN)

**src\format.js** - Left-pads strings (throws BAD_WIDTH)

**src\calc.js** - Division operation (throws DIV_ZERO)

**src\dates.js** - Parses ISO dates (throws BAD_DATE)

**src\index.js** - Aggregates all exports

content.text:
No `new Error(` calls remain anywhere in `src/`. The refactor is complete:

- **`src/errors.js`** — new file exporting `class AppError extends Error` with `.name === 'AppError'`, `.code`, and `.message` (human text only)
- **9 modules** (`validate.js`, `parse.js`, `money.js`, `range.js`, `store.js`, `auth.js`, `format.js`, `calc.js`, `dates.js`) — all `throw new Error('CODE: text')` replaced with `throw new AppError('CODE', 'text')`
- **`src/index.js`** — re-exports `AppError` via `...require('./errors.js')`
